name: Miraial Co., Ltd.
summary: Miraial Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of plastic and metal machining for semiconductor, automotive, medical device, and electronic components industries in Japan. The company offers wafer handling products, including wafer shipping and processing; fluid system products, such as fittings; and electrical components that include fluoro terminals. It also manufactures and distributes various vertical molding machines and metal molds; and offers plastic and metal processing services. The company was formerly known as Kakizaki Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Miraial Co., Ltd. in August 2003. Miraial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
